free_text: Measurement of neutron total cross sections at the
4.5 cm (thickness) aluminium with density of 1 g/cm3 at
VESUVIO spectrometer: - monitor S2 placed at a
distance of 13.43 m from the neutron moderator, is
used to measure the incident and the transmitted TOF
spectra - monitor S1 is placed at 8.60 m from the
moderator, and its count rate is employed to
normalize the spectra registered by S2
